findings.evidence: `rg -n "characteristicWeight_conjugate_canonical_single|conjugate_canonical" code/TauCeti/LowDimTopology/Plumbing` has no hit; the existing parallel API is `Weight.lean:187` `@[simp] theorem characteristicWeight_canonical_single`.
findings.fix: Add and tag `@[simp] theorem characteristicWeight_conjugate_canonical_single ... = -P.weight v - 1`, proved from `characteristicWeight_single`, `conjugate_val`, and `canonicalCharacteristic_apply`.
findings.issue: There is no public lemma computing the weight of the conjugate canonical covector on `Pi.single v 1`, leaving downstream users without the parallel normal form to `characteristicWeight_canonical_single`.

summary: The main conjugation normal form is now exposed and tagged, but the public API is still missing the concrete conjugate-canonical basis value promised by the feature and parallel to the existing canonical basis API.
